name: E2B
description: Secure cloud sandboxes for AI agents to run code. Supports Python, JS, and shell. Persistent filesystem, network access, and sub-100ms cold starts.

skills.name: Provision isolated cloud sandboxes for executing AI-generated code safely
skills.description: Provision isolated cloud sandboxes for executing AI-generated code safely

skills.name: Persist filesystem state across agent steps within a single sandbox session

skills.name: Run Python, JavaScript, shell, and arbitrary language runtimes in each sandbox
skills.description: Run Python, JavaScript, shell, and arbitrary language runtimes in each sandbox

skills.name: Support long-running agent workloads with up to 24-hour sandbox lifetimes
skills.description: Support long-running agent workloads with up to 24-hour sandbox lifetimes

skills.name: Integrate as an OpenAI code interpreter drop-in or with any LLM framework
